children.heading: Assurance to Export-Import Bank of repayment
children.label: 1 Assurance to Export-Import Bank of repayment
children.text: The President is authorized to provide guarantees to the Bank for liabilities described in paragraph (2) in order to satisfy the requirement of section 2(b)(1)(B) of the Export-Import Bank Act of 1945 () that the Bank have reasonable assurance of repayment.12 U.S.C. 635(b)(1)(B)1So in original. Probably should be “has”.1

children.heading: Liabilities which may be guaranteed
children.label: 2 Liabilities which may be guaranteed
children.text: The liabilities that may be guaranteed under paragraph (1) are liabilities incurred by the Bank in connection with guarantees or insurance provided under the Export-Import Bank Act of 1945 [ et seq.] for financing for transactions involving the export of goods and services for the use of the private sector in Poland.12 U.S.C. 635

children.heading: Guarantees available only for short-term guarantees and insurance
children.label: b Guarantees available only for short-term guarantees and insurance
children.text: Guarantees provided under subsection (a) shall be for short-term guarantees and insurance extended by the Bank which shall be repayable within a period not to exceed one year from the date of arrival at the port of importation of the goods and services covered by such guarantees or insurance.

children.heading: Agreement on criteria and procedures
children.label: c Agreement on criteria and procedures
children.text: Guarantees or insurance extended by the Bank and guaranteed pursuant to subsection (a) shall be provided by the Bank in accordance with criteria and procedures agreed to by the Administrator and the Bank.

children.heading: Reserve fund
children.label: d Reserve fund
children.text: The agreement referred to in subsection (c) shall also provide for the establishment of a reserve fund by the administering agency, with such funds made available to the reserve as the Administrator deems necessary to discharge liabilities under guarantees provided under subsection (a).

children.heading: Funds which may be used
children.label: 1 Funds which may be used
children.text: Such amounts of the funds made available to carry out part IV of subchapter II of this chapter (relating to the economic support fund) as the President determines are necessary may be made available to discharge liabilities under guarantees entered into under subsection (a).

children.heading: Crediting of subsequent payments
children.label: 2 Crediting of subsequent payments
children.text: To the extent that any of the funds made available pursuant to paragraph (1) are paid out for a claim arising out of liabilities guaranteed under subsection (a), amounts received after the date of such payment, with respect to such claim, shall be credited to the reserve fund established pursuant to subsection (d), shall be merged with the funds in such reserve, and shall be available for the purpose of payments by the Administrator to the Bank for guarantees under subsection (a).

children.heading: Appropriations action required
children.label: f Appropriations action required
children.text: Commitments to guarantee under subsection (a) are authorized only to the extent and in the amounts provided in advance in appropriations Acts.

children.heading: Limitation on outstanding commitments
children.label: g Limitation on outstanding commitments
children.text: The aggregate amount of outstanding commitments under subsection (a) may not exceed $200,000,000 of contingent liability for loan principal during any fiscal year.

children.heading: Administrative and technical assistance
children.label: i Administrative and technical assistance
children.text: The Bank shall provide, without reimbursement, such administrative and technical assistance to the administering agency as the Bank and the Administrator determine appropriate to assist the administering agency in carrying out this section.
shall be credited to the reserve fund established pursuant to subsection (d),
shall be merged with the funds in such reserve, and
shall be available for the purpose of payments by the administering agency to the Bank for guarantees under subsection (a).

children.heading: Restrictions not applicable
children.label: k Restrictions not applicable
children.text: Prohibitions on the use of foreign assistance funds for assistance for Poland shall not apply with respect to the funds made available to carry out this section.

children.heading: Expiration of authority
children.label: l Expiration of authority
children.text: The President may not enter into any commitments to guarantee under subsection (a) after .September 30, 1992
the term “administering agency” means the Agency for International Development;
the term “Administrator” means the Administrator of the Agency for International Development; and
the term “Bank” means the Export-Import Bank of the United States.
